description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular black metal head with two flat striking faces. The head is solid and appears to be forged from steel, showing a slightly glossy finish with some visible wear and scuff marks. The handle is made of wood, straight and cylindrical, with a natural, unfinished look and visible grain patterns. The handle shows signs of use, including dirt, minor discoloration, and surface abrasions, but remains structurally sound. The connection between the head and handle is tight, with the wooden end of the handle visible through the center of the head. This tool is designed for delivering powerful blows, suitable for demolition or heavy construction tasks in urban environments.
description: A sturdy sledgehammer with a black steel head and a straight wooden handle, showing signs of use and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striking face of the black metal head and the circular end of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular profile of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite end of the handle and the back striking face of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length and the other side of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, cylindrical, natural finish, no visible grip enhancements, some surface abrasions and discoloration
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid steel, two flat striking faces, no claws or peens, black finish with some wear
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible dirt, minor discoloration, and surface abrasions on the handle; scuff marks and wear on the hammer head
